calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: E2_world 1-Step Loss + Full Fixes (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9) — Seed 0
items.description: Three fixes vs EXQ-023: (1) 1-step direct E2_world loss added to rollout training, (2) alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008 fix), (3) hazard_harm=0.02 → avg episode 182 steps → ~182k training steps (was 18 steps / ~5500 steps). Probe env: 6 hazards min_dist>2. PASS C1: event_selectivity>0.005, C2: e2w_improvement_ratio>2.0x, C3: var_diff>0.001, C4: calibration_gap>0.05.

items.title: E2_world 1-Step Loss + Full Fixes — Seed 1
items.description: Repeat of EXQ-024 with seed=1 for robustness.

items.title: SD-005 Strict — Event-Conditional Separation (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02 (was 0.5 in prior run, causing 18-step episodes), alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008 fix), train_episodes=1000. Three event types: empty_move, env_caused_hazard, agent_caused_hazard. Tests C1: Δz_world(env)>Δz_world(empty) margin>0.005, C2: Δz_self(empty)>Δz_world(empty) (body selectivity), C3: E2 action-conditional divergence near-hazard>safe margin>0.002.

items.title: MECH-100 Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Tests SD-009/MECH-100: CE event classifier (Linear(world_dim,3)) backprops through z_world encoder. Labels: 0=none, 1=env_caused_hazard, 2=agent_caused_hazard. λ_event=0.5. PASS C1: calibration_gap>0.05, C2: event_classification_acc>0.5, C3: selectivity_margin>0.005.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Encoder Loss — Seed 1
items.description: Repeat of EXQ-020 with seed=1 for robustness.

items.title: Three-Stream Lateral Head (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9) — Seed 0
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Tests MECH-099: lateral_head in SplitEncoder produces z_harm from hazard+contamination channels only (50-dim input). E3 net_eval uses z_harm instead of z_world, bypassing E2_world identity shortcut. PASS C1: calibration_gap>0.05 using z_harm, C2: z_harm selectivity margin>0.01, C3: benefit events>20.

items.title: Combined Lateral + Reafference (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9) — Seed 0
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Combines lateral head (z_harm) and lstsq reafference correction of z_world. Attribution uses combined_head([z_harm; E2.world_forward(z_w_corrected, a)]). Tests whether combination overcomes both the identity shortcut and perspective-shift contamination. PASS C1: calibration_gap>0.05.

items.title: ARC-016 Dynamic Precision Commitment Test (hazard_harm=0.02)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, train_episodes=1000. Stable env (drift_prob=0.1) vs perturbed (drift_prob=0.9). Tests whether proper dynamic precision drives commit behavior. PASS: commit_rate_stable>commit_rate_perturbed AND var_diff>0.02. Prior runs showed var_diff≈0 because short episodes provided no temporal structure.

items.title: MECH-058 V3 Timescale Separation (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, warmup=1000, alpha_world=0.9. Tests autocorrelation of z_self vs z_world deltas. Expected: z_world has longer autocorrelation than z_self after reafference correction. Prior run showed z_self more autocorrelated than z_world (backwards from MECH-058) due to alpha=0.3 EMA suppression.

items.title: MECH-095 TPJ Agency-Detection Proxy (hazard_harm=0.02)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, warmup=1000, eval=200. Tests: (1) E2 motor-sensory mismatch elevated at harm vs safe steps, (2) mismatch does NOT distinguish agent_caused from env_caused harm (z_self blind to cause type). PASS: harm_safe_gap>0.005 AND agent_env_gap<0.05.

items.title: Event-Auxiliary Contrastive Loss — Strong λ=2.0 (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. EXQ-020 variant with λ_event=2.0 (4× stronger contrastive signal). If EXQ-020 achieves classification accuracy but not calibration_gap, tests whether stronger CE loss helps. Risk: forgetting of E1/E2 reconstruction.

items.title: Combined Event-Contrastive + lstsq Reafference (hazard_harm=0.02, alpha=0.9)
items.description: FIXED: hazard_harm=0.02, alpha_world=0.9, warmup=1000. Combines EXQ-020 (contrastive CE loss) and lstsq reafference correction. Tests whether combination produces calibration_gap>0.05 when neither alone does.

items.title: Three-Stream Lateral Head — Seed 2
items.description: Repeat of EXQ-015 with seed=2 for robustness.

items.title: MECH-071 V3: E3.harm_eval Calibration Gap (alpha_world=0.9, no reafference)
items.description: V3 redesign of MECH-071: tests whether E3.harm_eval(z_world) distinguishes agent-caused hazard vs locomotion states. alpha_world=0.9 (SD-008 prerequisite). No reafference correction (baseline for EXQ-027). PASS: calibration_gap>0.05. Prerequisite for SD-003 attribution.

items.title: SD-003 V3: Full Reafference Pipeline (SD-007 + SD-008 + E3.harm_eval)
items.description: Full V3 SD-003 attribution pipeline: ReafferencePredictor trained on empty steps removes perspective-shift from z_world. E3.harm_eval(z_world_corrected) evaluated by event type. PASS: calibration_gap>0.15 (higher bar than EXQ-026 because reafference should clean up signal). Tests SD-007 implementation in LatentStack.encode().
